     Title: Revisiting Character-level Adversarial Attacks for Language Models 
     Authors: Elias Abad Rocamora ,  Yongtao Wu ,  Fanghui Liu ,  Grigorios G. Chrysos ,  Volkan Cevher              View a PDF of the paper titled Revisiting Character-level Adversarial Attacks for Language Models, by Elias Abad Rocamora and Yongtao Wu and Fanghui Liu and Grigorios G.              Abstract: Adversarial attacks in Natural Language Processing apply perturbations in the character or token levels. Token-level attacks, gaining prominence for their use of gradient-based methods, are susceptible to altering sentence semantics, leadi
